title: Local RAG: Fast codebase lookup
description: Show how Local RAG vector search locates code faster and provides grounded snippets for prompts.
preconditions: Local RAG indexing completed for KitchenSink
Core ML assets installed (if using Core ML provider)

steps.message: Topic: Local RAG dashboard. Type continue to move the UI to Local RAG.
Topic: Provider + assets (Core ML status). Type continue to fetch MCP status.
Topic: Run a vector search inside the UI. Type continue to populate the query and search.
Core ML embedding provider selection Local RAG
Topic: Show the UI results and compare to MCP output. Type continue to fetch MCP search output.

arguments.query: Core ML embedding provider selection Local RAG

steps.template: Use these snippets to answer: Where is the embedding provider selected, and how does it fall back? Provide file paths and a short summary.

steps.message: Topic: Explain how Local RAG grounded the answer. Type continue to proceed.
